support_policy.standard_support: 24-hour customer support available for critical systems
support_policy.escalation_threshold: Sentiment score below -0.6 triggers immediate priority escalation.

faqs.question: What core services does Ekara Digital offer?
faqs.answer: We specialize in custom Software Development, AI & Machine Learning solutions, Cloud Infrastructure design, ERP/CRM support, and Digital Marketing strategies.

faqs.question: How can Ekara help with Artificial Intelligence?
faqs.answer: We help businesses build smart chatbots, predictive analytics models, recommendation engines, and data-driven dashboards to transform raw data into actionable insights.

faqs.question: Do you support older or legacy software systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specialize in Supporting Legacy Systems, focusing on performance optimization, troubleshooting, and ensuring compatibility with modern business processes to reduce replacement costs.

faqs.question: What hosting plans do you provide?
faqs.answer: We offer three main tiers: Basic (Hosting & Backups), Intermediate (Monitoring & Limited Support), and Service+ (includes 5 Email Accounts and advanced activity monitoring).

faqs.question: How do I get a quote for a new project?
faqs.answer: You can fill out the contact form on our website or email us directly at info@ekara.nz. Our team typically responds with a quote or follow-up within 2-3 business days.

faqs.question: What is your approach to software testing?
faqs.answer: We use advanced QA methodologies including functional, performance, security, and usability testing. Our goal is to resolve issues early in the lifecycle using both automated scripts and manual testing.

faqs.question: Does Ekara provide Cloud and DevOps services?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design scalable, secure cloud solutions and streamline development through DevOps automation to accelerate delivery and improve collaboration.

faqs.question: How long has Ekara been in operation?
faqs.answer: Ekara Digital has been delivering excellence for over 16 years, completing 100+ projects across 5 different countries.

faqs.question: My system is down or extremely slow.
faqs.answer: For critical system failures, Ekara provides 24-hour support. Please ensure your internet connection is stable; if the issue persists, our engineers will intervene.
